svg.title: Bank coverage decomposition
svg.desc: Gold spans are split into cataloged exact matches, cataloged exact-span misses, cataloged wrong mappings, and entities outside the bank. Outside-bank spans measure bank construction coverage, not NERB matcher recall. Combined: 142 cataloged exact and correctly mapped, 4 cataloged exact-span misses, 0 cataloged wrong mappings, and 1,247 outside the bank, from 1,393 gold spans. Contact: 122 cataloged exact and correctly mapped, 4 cataloged exact-span misses, 0 cataloged wrong mappings, and 0 outside the bank, from 126 gold spans. Person: 20 cataloged exact and correctly mapped, 0 cataloged exact-span misses, 0 cataloged wrong mappings, and 1,247 outside the bank, from 1,267 gold spans.
svg.text: Outside-bank spans are a catalog-construction result, not matcher misses.
142 exact · 4 span miss · 0 wrong mapping · 1,247 outside
122 exact · 4 span miss · 0 wrong mapping · 0 outside
20 exact · 0 span miss · 0 wrong mapping · 1,247 outside
